heading: Data Plane
body:
The **Data Plane** in the preceding diagram is where your data
resides.  You can configure Atlas Data Federation to access data in a variety of
storage services. Specifically, you can configure Atlas Data Federation to access
data in your AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) buckets, Azure Blob Storage containers, Google Cloud Storage
buckets, Atlas clusters, Atlas Online Archives, and
HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) and HTTPS (Secure HyperText Transport Protocol) URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s. To learn more about configuring Atlas Data Federation
to access your data stores, see [Storage Configuration](config-adf).
